desc: Powering Bangladesh's commodity and accident tracking platform (bdtracks.com). Built 15+ web scrapers and fine-tuned Google Gemini 2.5 Flash/Pro via Vertex AI for automated data classification. Engineered production pipelines processing daily feeds from multiple national sources into structured datasets serving live dashboards.

Shipped 4 production React websites for this US-based digital agency, driving 1.5x client revenue growth measured by post-launch analytics and client billing. Full lifecycle ownership — design, React 19 + TanStack Start architecture, and Netlify deployment — across restaurant, e-commerce, and agency platforms serving 50,000+ end users.

Built production RAG pipelines for academic resource retrieval using Pinecone, ChromaDB, LangChain, and LlamaIndex. Engineered automated LLM evaluation pipelines and FastAPI backends powering curriculum-aligned tutoring systems. Benchmarked embedding quality across vector databases to optimize retrieval accuracy.

Led a team of 5 developers to ship a 2D platformer with 3 levels, a custom OpenGL rendering engine, SFML audio, and SQLite persistence — within a 3-month deadline. Earned 4 GitHub forks and a YouTube demo.
